concerns.detail: Deletion removes substantive observations about advisor NWU Kaize Ding (allegations of dating students and reneging on intern offers) and replaces them with only the name of a different professor (Duke Yiran Chen). This appears to suppress specific legitimate advising complaints rather than perform cleanup.
concerns.excerpt:
- NWU Kaize Ding
- 丁丁老师xhs已经家喻户晓了吧？现在还在跟学生谈恋爱吗？
- 鸽子老师，招一堆intern 口头commit offer然后单方面decline

+ Duke Yiran Chen
